title: More Nonsense Limerick 62
content:
There was an old man whose despair
    Induced him to purchase a hare:
    Whereon one fine day 
    He rode wholly away,
    Which partly assuaged his despair.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 62"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
